comments.body:
@cfergeau The v0.8.9 github release is not published. Is that expected? We need it to pull in the release artifacts

ref https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/28609

> @cfergeau The v0.8.9 github release is not published. Is that expected? We need it to pull in the release artifacts
> 
> ref #28609

I’ll keep working on it now, I was afk while CI was running/…

Edit: Published now https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/releases/tag/v0.8.9

Are the windows tests known to have issues? or could this be one more problem with gvproxy?
